patterns: admission ke liye kya karna hoga
responses:
📋 Admission Process at ITM Gwalior:

1️⃣ Visit www.itmgoi.in → Click 'Online Apply'
2️⃣ Fill the application form with personal & academic details
3️⃣ Upload documents (marksheets, Aadhar, photo)
4️⃣ Pay application fee of ₹500 online
5️⃣ For B.Tech: Appear in JEE Mains & participate in RGPV DTE MP counselling
6️⃣ For BCA/BBA/B.Com/MBA: Direct admission on merit basis
7️⃣ Attend counselling with original documents
8️⃣ Pay admission fee & confirm your seat
9️⃣ Classes begin from August 2026

📞 Admission Helpline: +91-7773005065 / +91-7773001624
📧 Email: admission@itmgoi.in
🌐 Apply: http://itmgoi.in/OnlineApply_ITMGOI

🎓 Courses Offered at ITM Gwalior (RGPV Affiliated):

  • B.Tech IT (Information Technology) ← NEW!

📚 Postgraduate:

Ask me about any specific course for fees, eligibility & career scope!

patterns: jee ke baad kya karna hai
responses:
📋 RGPV / DTE MP B.Tech Counselling Process:

🎯 Step-by-Step Guide:

1️⃣ JEE Mains Score Required
   • Minimum qualifying percentile set by RGPV/DTE MP

2️⃣ Online Registration at DTE MP Portal
   • Website: dte.mponline.gov.in
   • Register with JEE Roll No. & personal details

3️⃣ Document Verification
   • Submit 10th, 12th marksheets, category certificate

4️⃣ Online Choice Filling
   • Select college preferences (add ITM Gwalior!)
   • Choose branch preferences

5️⃣ Seat Allotment (Merit Based)
   • Multiple rounds: Round 1, Round 2, Mop-up Round
   • Based on JEE rank + category

6️⃣ Report to ITM Gwalior
   • Pay fees & complete admission formalities
   • Bring all original documents

📞 Need counselling help? Call: +91-7773005065
🌐 Apply directly: http://itmgoi.in/OnlineApply_ITMGOI

patterns: which course is best for me
maths mein weak hoon konsa loon
responses:
🎯 Course Recommendation Guide:

• Coding, software, AI, data, security -> B.Tech CSE
• Web/app development, IT support -> B.Tech IT or BCA
• Hardware, electronics, telecom -> B.Tech ECE
• Machines, production, automobiles -> B.Tech ME
• Civil works, construction, infrastructure -> B.Tech Civil
• Business, management, entrepreneurship -> BBA or MBA

If you share your interest, I can suggest the best branch for you.
